ui.tagline: Your online-safety buddy. Ready to explore the world together?
ui.worldSubtitle: Four parts of Aiko's world. More opening soon.
ui.errorBody: This usually means the page was opened directly from a folder. Aiko needs a small local server. Open a terminal in the project folder, run the command below, then visit http://localhost:8000
ui.spotPrompt: What feels a little off here?
ui.spotHint: 🔍 Tap the part of the message that feels off
ui.finalScore: You got {score} of {total} safe on the first try. Replay any time to sharpen up.
ui.parentNotePerfect: Your child spotted all {flags} red flags and made the safe choice first time, every time — {topics}.
ui.parentNoteRethink: Your child reached every safe choice, after rethinking {count} moment(s). A good chat to have this week: {topic}.
ui.footer: Aiko is a practice space. In real life, always tell a grown-up you trust.
